name: Amylyx Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Amylyx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (also referred to as Amylyx, we, our or us) is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company with a mission to develop and advance novel therapies for communities with high unmet medical needs. We have preclinical and clinical development programs underway in endocrine conditions and neurodegenerative diseases.
